body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Closes #725 
The snow parameterization test previously failed unpredictably. This fixes that issue by setting the random seed


## To-do
<!---  list of proposed tasks in the PR, move to "Content" on completion 
- Proposed task
-->


## Content
- issue was reproduced by running the test repeatedly with a bash script. It failed around 5% of the time
- added a random seed and reran bash script to verify no failures


<!---
Review checklist

I have:
- followed the codebase contribution guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/Contributing/
- followed the style guide: https://clima.github.io/ClimateMachine.jl/latest/DevDocs/CodeStyle/
- followed the documentation policy: https://github.com/CliMA/policies/wiki/Documentation-Policy
- checked that this PR does not duplicate an open PR.

In the Content, I have included 
- relevant unit tests, and integration tests, 
- appropriate docstrings on all functions, structs, and modules, and included relevant documentation.

-->

----
- [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Add random seed to snow parameterization test

Adds back in soil water content and temperature plots
Makes ozark_pft.jl use diagnostics (since it should produce the same plots/etc as run_fluxnet at US-MOz, but just with different parameters)
Removes saving callback completely from run_fluxnet

body: ## Purpose The logo previously had a little bit of white showing over the "I" in Clima and was quite large in the readme. I do not know why, but the svg has a rectangle there. This removes that rectangle. Old: New: The rectangle was only visible when rendered in certain ways. For example, viewing the svg directly in Firefox does not show it and viewing it in an html file does not show it. When viewed through a markdown file, using html or the normal method of inserting images, the white rectangle is visible. closes #803 ## To-do ## Content - remove rectangle from both .svg files - scale down logo (please suggest a better looking size if you have one) ---- - [x] I have read and checked the items on the review checklist.
title: Tr/fix logo i
